ResourceHeader.Description: The Longyearbyen (LYR) Observatory, is the world's northernmost optical auroral observatory. Operated by the University Centre in Svalbard (UNIS), it plays a critical role in global atmospheric and space weather research.
ResourceHeader.Acknowledgement: Please acknowledge: UiT The Arctic University of Norway

InformationURL.Name: Tromsø Geophysical Observatory
InformationURL.Description: Requestion form for magnetometer data, plots, indices, maps, etc.

InformationURL.Name: THEMIS Fluxgate Ground-based Magnetometer (GMAG) Web Site
InformationURL.Description: THEMIS makes data available from GMAG stations in the United States, Canada, Denmark, Greenland, Norway, Sweden, Iceland, and Russia, and Antarctica.
